name: Yotascale
description: Yotascale — ML-driven cloud cost management with cost attribution, anomaly detection, and team showback.

seo.title: Yotascale — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Yotascale: Yotascale — ML-driven cloud cost management with cost attribution, anomaly detection, and team showback.

when_to_use: ML-driven cloud cost attribution and anomaly detection
Team-level showback and chargeback for multi-cloud spend
Unit economics modeling: cost per customer or transaction
FinOps intelligence replacing manual tagging and spreadsheets
Real-time budget monitoring with automated Slack alerts

pros: ML-driven cost attribution tuned for engineering teams
Team-level showback with minimal tagging pain
cons: Smaller brand than CloudHealth or Apptio
Heavier than needed for simple spend tracking
review.verdict: Engineer-friendly cost attribution with sharp ML anomaly detection, mostly a fit for mid-to-large cloud spenders.
review.best_for: Engineering orgs with $1M+ monthly cloud spend wanting team-level attribution
review.not_for: Small teams happy with Vantage, Infracost, or native provider dashboards
